ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the test site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the test site */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the test site is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the test site is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the test site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the test site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the test site */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the test site */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the test site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Time slot for the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., available, booked) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the test site */,
  "available_slots" INTEGER /* Number of available time slots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the patient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the patient */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the patient registered */,
  "registration_time" TEXT /* Time the patient registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES scheduling ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registration */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was received */,
  "result_time" TEXT /* Time the test result was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, healthcare professional) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance provider (e.g., private, public) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the insurance provider */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the insurance provider */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the insurance provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the insurance provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_insurance" (
  "patient_insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the patient's insurance */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., individual, family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_insurance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_site_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., nurse, doctor) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_site_staff_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., PCR machine, rapid test kit) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_equipment_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_supplies" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test site */,
  "supply_name" TEXT /* Name of the supply */,
  "supply_type" TEXT /* Type of supply (e.g., masks, gloves) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_supplies_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES test_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was received */,
  "result_time" TEXT /* Time the test result was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date the symptom was reported */,
  "symptom_time" TEXT /* Time the symptom was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., test result, appointment reminder) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_info" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, insurance) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Time the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_info_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
